title: tabernaemontana crispa
intro: Tabernaemontana crispa, also known as the krung sari or heartleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana crispa include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
